cycle_4907_directive.bolt_completed_this_cycle: #554 [SOLD-PDP-CROSSSELL] regression coverage delivered (534cac9) — e2e/sold-pdp.spec.ts (84 lines): Playwright spec flips a category product to sold via PrismaClient, navigates the sold slug, asserts data-testid='sold-similar-carousel' renders ≥4 ProductCard items + inline 'Hlídat podobný' anchor CTA (#hlidat-podobny). Skips gracefully when no eligible category exists in dev DB. Pairs with the carousel scoring rewrite that landed inside Trace 3db9e4f same cycle — see trace_completed_this_cycle. tsc 0, eslint 0.
cycle_4907_directive.trace_completed_this_cycle: #531 [PERF-FIELD-BASELINE] null-result + sold-PDP carousel scoring rewrite delivered (3db9e4f). Two payloads in one commit: (a) §7 Field Metrics Probe appended to docs/audits/perf-verify-phase4-2026-04-25.md (95 lines): documents 14-endpoint sweep against api.vercel.com/v1/* + /v9/projects/[id]/insights/* under project-scoped token VERCEL_API_TOKEN — every documented Speed Insights surface returns 404, only insights/web-vitals?startTime/endTime exposes hasData:true flag with no series. Three closure paths: dashboard manual screenshot, Cache-Components RUM tap, or Vercel Pro plan with Analytics API. Phase 4 code-level acceptance per §4 stands regardless. (b) src/app/(shop)/products/[slug]/page.tsx +31/-14 lines: rewrote RelatedProductsSection sold-branch scoring to spec-priority brand(+20) > size-overlap(+8) > condition(+4) > price-proximity(max+3, decay /200) per #554 directive — was previously brand(+3)/size(+10)/price(+5,decay /100) with no condition signal. Also added sourceProduct condition lookup, data-testid='sold-similar-carousel' anchor, copy refresh ('Seřazeno podle značky, velikosti a stavu — vybírej dál.'), and inline 'Dej mi vědět o podobném →' chip CTA targeting #hlidat-podobny anchor. Pairs with Bolt 534cac9 e2e regression test.

next_cycle_directives.bolt_p1: #555 [SOLD-PDP-DOUBLE-WIDGET] — Trace W-2 finding. Resolve double notify form on sold PDP. Inspect src/app/(shop)/products/[slug]/page.tsx around the sold branch — both <BackInStockForm /> (from #550 BackInStockSubscription) and <ProductNotifyRequest /> (legacy) currently mount, risking double email dispatch on same email+product event. Recommended: keep BackInStockForm only on sold-PDP (tighter tuple match brand+category+condition+size), retire ProductNotifyRequest from sold-PDP path (keep on available PDP where the path differs). Add e2e/sold-pdp regression assertion that data-testid='back-in-stock-form' renders exactly once and ProductNotifyRequest is absent on sold slug. tsc 0, eslint 0 expected.
next_cycle_directives.bolt_p2: #556 [EMAIL-DEDUP] — Cross-table notify dedup gate (24h window). Spec: new lib/email-dispatch.ts that wraps sendBackInStock + sendWishlistSold + sendSimilarItemArrived with EmailDedupLog table check on (email, productId, eventType, sentAt > now-24h). Skip+log on hit. Idempotent + transactional. Migrate 3 cron call-sites to route through the wrapper. New Prisma model EmailDedupLog with @@unique([email, productId, eventType]) and createdAt index for the 24h window query. Add unit test covering all three branches.
next_cycle_directives.bolt_p3: If #555+#556 land quickly: file fresh task for cron observability (lib/cron-metrics.ts wrapping requireCronSecret routes with duration + error counters posted to existing GA4 measurement-protocol — closes the loop on cron silent-failure visibility post #499 timing-safe migration).

cycle_4907_directive.priority_rationale: Cycle #4907 was a tight 2-commit delivery cycle: Trace pivoted onto carousel scoring (production code in 3db9e4f) AFTER discovering Speed Insights API was closed, and Bolt landed e2e regression coverage in 534cac9. Net effect: #554 closed via cross-agent collaboration; #531 closed as null-result with documented closure paths and a new (low-priority) bectly screenshot gate; sold-PDP cross-sell shipped end-to-end (scoring + UI + CTA + regression test). Bolt's bandwidth opens entirely for #555 widget collapse (P1 — last sold-PDP gap) + #556 email dedup (P2 — defends the new BackInStock/WishlistSold/SimilarItem triple from concurrent fires). Trace pivots to Phase 7 sweep on the new landings (carousel + Pinterest + WishlistSubscription). Sage at 3 templates left, 1/cycle cadence resumes.
